news.title: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
news.summary: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.

news.title: Inside the Obama-era Iran nuclear deal that Trump withdrew from
news.summary: The U.S. and Iran have yet to reach a peace deal or address Iran's nuclear ambitions. Despite signals from Trump that talks are progressing, there are no signs of progress.

news.title: Chinese EVs may hit U.S. within a few years, one way or another
news.summary: Chinese electric vehicles are likely to be sold in the U.S. within years, despite tariffs, strict laws and opposition from the auto industry and politicians.

news.title: Wall Street's 'fear gauge' punches back as the 'crash up' in chip stocks finally reverses
news.summary: The VIX at last caught up with other volatility metrics. The monster rally in semiconductor stocks hit a wall on Friday, and the VIX hit a record high.

news.title: Abel goes his own way with new Berkshire investments, including billions for AI
news.summary: Berkshire Hathaway CEO Greg Abel has "launched" with his first major deal. Warren Buffett tells CNBC's Becky Quick that Abel has made a big deal.

news.title: The U.S. stock market is facing historic downside risk — these 10 low-volatility stocks can protect your portfolio
news.summary: Low-volatility stocks give investors a smoother ride. They are beating the market on a risk-adjusted basis. Low-volatile stocks are better than risk-averse stocks on a long-term basis.

news.title: The blowout jobs report is bad news for stocks — but it shouldn’t force the Fed’s hand on interest rates
news.summary: "Rate hikes now will choke off the critical investments needed to lower prices," he says. "It's time for the Fed to take a more aggressive stance"

news.title: We thought we found the perfect luxury retirement community, but it’s millions of dollars in debt. Are we trapped?
news.summary: “If we were to leave, we would lose a portion of our buy-in — about $80,000,” he says.

news.title: Can SpaceX live up to Wall Street’s multitrillion-dollar hype?
news.summary: Some analysts warn that the company’s ‘moonshot’ projections could fall short. SpaceX is preparing for the biggest public debut in history.

news.title: ‘This would be a one-time event’: How can I take extra money from my 401(k) without triggering higher Medicare premiums?
news.summary: “I generally withdraw money from my traditional 401(k) for projects, larger expenses and sometimes just to stay ahead on upcoming bills,” she says.
